quotes: This application is very very simplified my trading journey. only just one click to option buying and selling.

I sold share's of 1700 rs and recieve 1600 in account 100 rs deducted as brokrage and other charges 6-7% of total amount as charges are so huge these things happen everytime I sold share's my personal opinion is to not use this app must switch for any another app disgusting application ever
very good  app I personally recommend for trading thank you Groww team
actions: Improve the user interface and simplify the trading process
Review and adjust fees and charges to be more competitive and transparent
Enhance security measures to prevent unauthorized transactions and data breaches
